title: Enhance AI agent system prompt with new tool capabilities
goal: AI 에이전트의 시스템 프롬프트를 강화하여 browser_auto(Playwright), mcp, 동적 파라미터(${template}), 조건부 스텝(condition)을 AI가 계획에 활용할 수 있게 한다. AI가 멀티스텝 계획 시 동적 파라미터와 조건부 실행을 적극 사용하도록 유도한다.

test_requirements.case: System prompt includes browser_auto tool description
test_requirements.expected: prompt mentions navigate, click, type, screenshot, extract_text actions

test_requirements.case: System prompt includes mcp tool description when servers configured
test_requirements.expected: prompt mentions mcp tool with server names from config

test_requirements.case: System prompt includes dynamic parameter syntax
System prompt includes conditional step syntax
test_requirements.expected: prompt explains condition field on steps

test_requirements.case: System prompt without MCP servers omits MCP section
test_requirements.expected: no mcp mention when no servers in config

test_requirements.case: plan() can return steps with param_template=true
test_requirements.expected: returned step dict can include param_template field

constraints: Do not change plan(), continue_task(), or other function signatures
Only modify the system prompt building logic
Do not add AI calls in tests — test the prompt content, not AI output
MCP section only appears when servers are configured
Existing AI agent tests must pass
test_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
